ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Update – July 2024
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Hope you’re doing well! Here’s our quick update from this week’s marketing sprint. 

1. **New Launch Alert** – Our ‘Summer Breeze’ collection is live. 20% off for the first 100 customers. Use code: SUMMER20.
2. **Upcoming Sale** – The ‘Back to School’ promo starts on 15th July. Expect a 30% discount on all school supplies.
3. **Customer Feedback** – 85% of respondents love the new packaging. Let’s keep the momentum going.
4. **Events** – Don’t forget the virtual workshop on “Digital Branding” next Wednesday at 3 PM. RSVP via the <URL> portal.

Thanks for your hard work and dedication. Let’s make this quarter a record breaker!

Best,

Riya Patel
Marketing Lead

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required for Gift Card Transfer
spam.body:
Dear [Your Name],

I hope you’re well. This is Abhishek Sharma, CEO of XYZ Pvt. Ltd. I am writing to inform you that we have processed a premium gift card worth INR 50,000 for your outstanding contributions. 

To complete the transfer, I need your bank details. Please verify your account information at the secure link below <URL> and confirm the transaction within the next 30 minutes. 

If I do not receive a response by 12:00 PM today, we will have to suspend your account to comply with our internal audit protocols. 

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,

Abhishek Sharma
Chief Executive Officer
XYZ Pvt. Ltd.
